fields.name: id
fields.notes: stable word id, used for repeated-card keys

computed.name: isEmpty
computed.notes: bank produced no words for the stage

dataModel.persistenceNotes: Spec section 6/9: no cross-session persistence. State (queue, knownCount) lives in memory for the study session only.

services.name: WordBankService
services.role: Loads the built-in word library filtered by learning stage.
services.notes: Built-in static word resource. No network, no login. Default stage 'basic'. Returns stable WordItem[] with unique ids.

study.owner: StudyPage owns queue/knownCount/isFlipped as @State; computed fields synced via syncFromQueue() after each transition

interactionFlows.name: toggle-flip-card
steps: Toggle isFlipped on the current card.
Render front (english) when isFlipped=false, back (meaning+phonetic) when isFlipped=true.

interactionFlows.name: mark-known
steps: Remove the current card (queue[0]) from the queue.
Advance to the new queue[0] (next card).
If queue is now empty, transition to complete state.
interactionFlows.expectedState: remainingCount decreased by 1; knownCount increased by 1; isFlipped=false; shows next card or completion panel

interactionFlows.name: mark-unknown
steps: Take the current card (queue[0]) and move it to the end of the queue.
Advance to the new queue[0] (next card).
interactionFlows.expectedState: remainingCount unchanged; knownCount unchanged; isFlipped=false; shows next card; unknown card scheduled for re-review at queue tail

interactionFlows.name: restart-study
steps: Reload the word queue from WordBankService for the current stage.
interactionFlows.expectedState: queue refilled; knownCount=0; isFlipped=false; studying state

changeRequests.topic: single-page shell vs scaffold bottom-tab shell
changeRequests.detail: Spec sections 4/5 explicitly require a single-page app with NO bottom tab navigation (launch directly into StudyPage). The scaffold ships a fixed multi-tab BottomTabBar shell (Theme/SvgIcon/TabTypes/BottomTabBar/Index). Plan: simplify Index.ets to a single-surface shell that loads StudyPage directly and omits BottomTabBar. Keep Theme.ets as the shared token source; leave BottomTabBar/TabTypes/SvgIcon present but unused unless tabs are added later.

During implementation, the completion description text (e.g. '已认识 X / Y 个单词') was bound to study-empty-state, causing a duplicate id warning. A new assertion target study-completion-desc was added to ui-tree.json and StudyPage.ets to resolve the conflict while preserving study-empty-state for the true empty-bank state.

The original plan placed session state in StudySession.ets with @Observed/@ObjectLink. During runtime verification, primitive @State values passed through a @Builder parameter lost reactivity, so the count labels did not update. To guarantee reactive updates, the queue/knownCount/remainingCount/totalCount/currentWord/isComplete state was moved directly into StudyPage as @State fields and synced via syncFromQueue(). StudySession.ets remains in the repo but is not imported by the running app; it can be removed or re-adopted if a future refactor solves the builder-reactivity issue.
